sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41526" key="e)pi/flecis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-φλεξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41526.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">application of heat,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καῦσις κατ᾽ ἐ.,</foreign> opp. caustics, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
